TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_bungluh, title = bungluh, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/bungluh} }

S.FORM: bungluh (kamu nu Hulam: Ťó§Ś£ļÔľõÁĀęŚĪĪÁąÜÁôľ), namakay i bayu a kakanan. u bungluh mamin i bayu amin a maudip, i labu kiyadahay i tida i kakelahan maaadihay nu kitidaan. masaadidi' henay malatusa ku ngatu nida, ku nida sananay midanguy a langaw, nika nu dikudan balaki tu caay tu pakalimad tu udip, i tida sananay tu midepit i atekakay a kitidaan, mahida i hekalay a ba'tu miedap tu siduma sa, kan a maudip. nika nanaman masabalaki a bungluh midepit i masasidumaay atekakay nu hekal, pasu u udip nu isu' baba'tuwan, sasa nu balunga, nika pidepit i balunga tada yadah tu ku bungluh, cunusan ku nu nipipulu' tu caliway nu balunga nikapalawpes han tu simal, sisa a pademiad saca misulac, u duma a balunga idaw ku nipasipasipan tu sakacaay pakadepit ku bungluh a zay-liw. i kakelahan hanany u bungluh sa u sakaidaw a kakanan u tademaw i dadipasan kakelahan nu bayu, i baba'tuan malumanay nu balunga atu mapaliday a tuudtuud, madayum a makaadih tu nikaidaw nu bungluh, kaatekak nu hekal mahida u nayay ku ukakay a nu bayuay a aadupan, nikaadih masaadidi'ay a lamalay a buyu'. namakayniay a nasulitan nasakamuan atu natinengan Ťó§Ś£ļ
S.PHON: buŇčr~…ĺuńß (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: *******), namakaj i baju a kakanan. u buŇčr~…ĺuńß mamin i baju amin a maudip, i r~…ĺabu kijadańßaj i tida i kak…ôr~…ĺańßan maaadińßaj nu kitidaan. masaadidi Ē~ ° ńß…ônaj mar~…ĺatusa ku Ňčatu nida, ku nida sananaj midaŇčuj a r~…ĺaŇčaw, nika nu dikudan bar~…ĺaki tu ¶aaj tu pakar~…ĺimad tu udip, i tida sananaj tu mid…ôpit i at…ôkakaj a kitidaan, mańßida i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj a ba Ē~ °tu mi…ôdap tu siduma sa, kan a maudip. nika nanaman masabar~…ĺaki a buŇčr~…ĺuńß mid…ôpit i masasidumaaj at…ôkakaj nu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ, pasu u udip nu isu Ē~ ° baba Ē~ °tuwan, sasa nu bar~…ĺuŇča, nika pid…ôpit i bar~…ĺuŇča tada jadańß tu ku buŇčr~…ĺuńß, ¶unusan ku nu nipipur~…ĺu Ē~ ° tu ¶ar~…ĺiwaj nu bar~…ĺuŇča nikapar~…ĺawp…ôs ńßan tu simar~…ĺ, sisa a pad…ômiad sa ¶a misur~…ĺa ¶, u duma a bar~…ĺuŇča idaw ku nipasipasipan tu saka ¶aaj pakad…ôpit ku buŇčr~…ĺuńß a zaj-r~…ĺiw. i kak…ôr~…ĺańßan ńßananj u buŇčr~…ĺuńß sa u sakaidaw a kakanan u tad…ômaw i dadipasan kak…ôr~…ĺańßan nu baju, i baba Ē~ °tuan mar~…ĺumanaj nu bar~…ĺuŇča atu mapar~…ĺidaj a tuudtuud, madajum a makaadińß tu nikaidaw nu buŇčr~…ĺuńß, kaat…ôkak nu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ mańßida u najaj ku ukakaj a nu bajuaj a aadupan, nikaadińß masaadidi Ē~ °aj a r~…ĺamar~…ĺaj a buju Ē~ °. namakajniaj a nasur~…ĺitan nasakamuan atu natin…ôŇčan **
S.FORM: bungluh (kamu nu Hulam: Ťó§Ś£ļÔľõÁĀęŚĪĪÁąÜÁôľ), namakay i bayu a kakanan. u bungluh mamin i bayu amin a maudip, i labu kiyadahay i tida i kakelahan maaadihay nu kitidaan. masaadidi' henay malatusa ku ngatu nida, ku nida sananay midanguy a langaw, nika nu dikudan balaki tu caay tu pakalimad tu udip, i tida sananay tu midepit i atekakay a kitidaan, mahida i hekalay a ba'tu miedap tu siduma sa, kan a maudip. nika nanaman masabalaki a bungluh midepit i masasidumaay atekakay nu hekal, pasu u udip nu isu' baba'tuwan, sasa nu balunga, nika pidepit i balunga tada yadah tu ku bungluh, cunusan ku nu nipipulu' tu caliway nu balunga nikapalawpes han tu simal, sisa a pademiad saca misulac, u duma a balunga idaw ku nipasipasipan tu sakacaay pakadepit ku bungluh a zay-liw. i kakelahan hanany u bungluh sa u sakaidaw a kakanan u tademaw i dadipasan kakelahan nu bayu, i baba'tuan malumanay nu balunga atu mapaliday a tuudtuud, madayum a makaadih tu nikaidaw nu bungluh, kaatekak nu hekal mahida u nayay ku ukakay a nu bayuay a aadupan, nikaadih masaadidi'ay a lamalay a buyu'. namakayniay a nasulitan nasakamuan atu natinengan Ťó§Ś£ļ
S.PHON: buŇčr~…ĺuńß (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: *******), namakaj i baju a kakanan. u buŇčr~…ĺuńß mamin i baju amin a maudip, i r~…ĺabu kijadańßaj i tida i kak…ôr~…ĺańßan maaadińßaj nu kitidaan. masaadidi Ē~ ° ńß…ônaj mar~…ĺatusa ku Ňčatu nida, ku nida sananaj midaŇčuj a r~…ĺaŇčaw, nika nu dikudan bar~…ĺaki tu ¶aaj tu pakar~…ĺimad tu udip, i tida sananaj tu mid…ôpit i at…ôkakaj a kitidaan, mańßida i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj a ba Ē~ °tu mi…ôdap tu siduma sa, kan a maudip. nika nanaman masabar~…ĺaki a buŇčr~…ĺuńß mid…ôpit i masasidumaaj at…ôkakaj nu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ, pasu u udip nu isu Ē~ ° baba Ē~ °tuwan, sasa nu bar~…ĺuŇča, nika pid…ôpit i bar~…ĺuŇča tada jadańß tu ku buŇčr~…ĺuńß, ¶unusan ku nu nipipur~…ĺu Ē~ ° tu ¶ar~…ĺiwaj nu bar~…ĺuŇča nikapar~…ĺawp…ôs ńßan tu simar~…ĺ, sisa a pad…ômiad sa ¶a misur~…ĺa ¶, u duma a bar~…ĺuŇča idaw ku nipasipasipan tu saka ¶aaj pakad…ôpit ku buŇčr~…ĺuńß a zaj-r~…ĺiw. i kak…ôr~…ĺańßan ńßananj u buŇčr~…ĺuńß sa u sakaidaw a kakanan u tad…ômaw i dadipasan kak…ôr~…ĺańßan nu baju, i baba Ē~ °tuan mar~…ĺumanaj nu bar~…ĺuŇča atu mapar~…ĺidaj a tuudtuud, madajum a makaadińß tu nikaidaw nu buŇčr~…ĺuńß, kaat…ôkak nu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ mańßida u najaj ku ukakaj a nu bajuaj a aadupan, nikaadińß masaadidi Ē~ °aj a r~…ĺamar~…ĺaj a buju Ē~ °. namakajniaj a nasur~…ĺitan nasakamuan atu natin…ôŇčan **
